boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; policy requires insurance-status class verification before start.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-IRI-089-P requires insurance-status class match before work begins.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: WARN-IRI-089 defect remains open; status-class trap unresolved.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Endorsement effective date met but status class not closed pre-execution.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source boundary remains open due to unresolved insurance-status class requirement in WARN-IRI-089 and STD-IRI-089-P. Endorsement END-IRI-089 covers coverage but does not close the status verification defect before 2026-06-28 start. Escalate for separate verification.
